course.title: A New Journey
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 12. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft #11 - A New Journey
lesson.transcript_en: On November 5th of 2022 I set forth on a quest to beat Minecraft by slaying the great Ender Dragon while also teaching the fine people of the internet English thus fishland was born and this series over the next several months I built up an Empire I built Farms I explored caves I even dug to the bottom of the world where I found many diamonds but then everything vanished the hard drive inside my computer failed the files of my world became corrupt and fishland was destroyed and so a new world was born black dragon's Flame my name is Kenzo and this is English from the ground up so welcome back to the series this is going to be my first video inside my new world black dragon's Flame so I named this world black dragon flame because the final boss in Minecraft is the Ender Dragon which is a black dragon so that's why I named it black dragon's Flame and I've actually done quite a bit of work in this world but before I show you my new world look at this Java Edition I decided to switch over to Java Edition in my previous Minecraft videos I was playing in Bedrock Edition and I was having a lot of problems with bedrock Edition so I decided to switch over to Java and hopefully Java will be better so single player black dragon's Flame let's enter the new world here we are the new world black dragon's so I'm going to start this video by showing you around my world because I've done a lot of work in this world I've built many things so first of all this is where I sleep this is supposed to be a hammock I love sleeping in hammocks in real life so I thought I would build a hammock in Minecraft for me to sleep in and behind me as you can probably hear is the barn so I have a sheep cows chickens and pigs in my barn just like my old barn this is a little path that leads right here to the farm but before I show you the farm I'm going to and in the morning I'll show you the it's a little Lantern as you can probably tell the game looks a little bit different than before there are shadows I have a shadow right here this is my there are shadows and also there are reflections in the water they're Reflections that's another reason why I wanted to switch over to Java Edition so this is my farm on my farm I've planted potatoes beet roots and wheat and I've also planted flowers all around my farm and that's because I want to put a beehive right here in the middle of my because then the bees would fly over to the flowers collect pollen from the flowers and fly back to The Beehive in the middle right and when the bees are flying while holding pollen they drop some of the pollen and it helps the crops to grow so I want to put a beehive right here in the middle to help the crops grow faster over there that is a platform that I built and in the future I want to build a huge statue on top of that platform down the stairs this is the entrance to the mine so just like the old mine this mine goes all the way to the bottom of the world which is where I found the diamonds that I used to build these diamond tools right next to the mine there is a fountain that I built hmm this is a fountain next to the fountain there's a bridge this bridge goes over the Stream it goes over the stream over here this is a building that I will talk about more a little bit later inside this building there is a spiral and some windows windows windows the staircase goes up up to here this is a tower where you can Overlook The View back down and inside this building there is a waterfall so this is water but it's actually a kind of elevator because you can swim up the waterfall very easily watch swim swim you see it's kind of like an elevator so now we're on top of the tower I haven't finished building this Tower yet I still need to build the roof up here but this is another Tower to look over the area and in the future if I can get some I can jump off of this Tower and fly okay back down the elevator the water and this is the final thing that I built this is a crafting and storage room so inside this room there are chests there are lots of chests and I built signs up here that say what is inside the chess so inside this chest right here there is deep slate inside this chest there are items that mobs drop when you kill them inside this chest there are items from nature like seeds and flowers and things like that over here these are armor stands on these stands you can place armor like this helmet oops on the armor stand you can place different pieces of armor like this helmet see over here this is a stone cutter so you can use this to turn Stone into different kinds of blocks this is a crafting table this is a loom for building things out of wool over here this is an anvil this is a grindstone this is a Fletching table I think that this is called a Fletching and this is a smithing table so here and here these are areas for crafting and out here this is a map of the area so right now I am right here this is the chest room this is the fountain this is the barn this is the mine this is the farm and these oh and these are the two huge Towers there's one more building that I still haven't shown you and that's because it's not finished yet it's right here so this is going to be the enchanting right now it's empty it's night time so I'm going to sleep but in the morning I will tell you my goal for this video all right morning so the first thing that I wanted to do in this video was show you around my new world the second thing that I wanted to do in this video is finish building the enchanting room so this is going to be the enchanting room in my old world I had just finished building the enchanting table and I've also built an enchanting table in this world it's inside this chest here it is the enchanting table first I'm going to place the enchanting table in the enchanting room I'm going to place the enchanting table right here there we go so now I've placed the enchanting table but if I try to use the enchanting table Watch What Happens so I'll put in my diamond sword and some lapis so look at this I can only get level 7 seven is okay but it's not great the enchanting table can be powered up to level 30. so level seven isn't that great so how do I power up the enchanting well you power up an enchanting table by building books and placing books all around the enchanting table so here here all around the enchanting table so I need to build a bunch of bookshelves and place them around the enchanting table in this chest I put everything that I will need to build the bookshelves leather to build books Uh Wood to build the bookshelves and sugar cane to build paper I'm going to start by turning all of this sugar cane into paper let's see p-a-p-e-r so I built 60 paper with paper and leather I will build books I have 56 books Now using books and wood I will build there we go so now I have 18 bookshelves which should be enough think you only need 15 bookshelves to fully power up the enchanting table so now I'm going to place these bookshelves all around the enchanting here here here here here here and here we go one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen fourteen fifteen so now let's see now I can get level 30 enchantments which will be a lot better than level seven enchantments sadly right now I'm only level 10. I'm going to end this video right here I introduced you to the new world and I also finished building the enchanting so if you liked this video like And subscribe and in the next video I'll go exploring Underground thank you so much for watching and I will see you in the next video see ya
